title: procs
text: procs Enable stored procedures. USYS$INF_PARAMS procs Description This option enables the creation and use of stored procedures. If both the serial insert and procs options are enabled, the INF connector does not use the insert stored procedure for tables that contain Serial fields. Note: The connector never uses stored procedures to manipulate segmented fields. If this option is not present, stored procedures are disabled. For more information on the use of stored procedures, refer to your Informix documentation. Related Links serial insert Insert specific values into serial fields. Was this topic helpful?
